tweets.text: .@SecPompeo: We’re cooperating with our partners and allies and friends across the world in unprecedented ways. It’s been a hallmark of the @realDonaldTrump administration. https://t.co/yT6plQmaeg

.@SecPompeo: The United States will stand with the people of India as they confront threats to their sovereignty and to their liberty. https://t.co/Gp0BsptR1M

Our new webpage documents the Chinese Communist Party’s blatant disregard for human rights. The United States will always stand up for those​ who are denied their fundamental human rights, including freedom of religion or belief and expression. https://t.co/YXn7t4jaZB
.@SecPompeo: When confronted by tyranny by the Chinese Communist Party, you can be sure that the United States will stand alongside its partners. https://t.co/mzTDir0NcM

The U.S. is the world's largest single donor of humanitarian assistance. Every nation has a responsibility to help. Together, we can ensure the world's most vulnerable people receive vital aid. https://t.co/wyzvSxOArg

The United States and Israel are committed to working with their partners to support the people of Sudan in strengthening their democracy, improving food security, countering terrorism and extremism, and tapping into their economic potential. https://t.co/XZFhio8jdk https://t.co/ZfHdUEfTFM
